name: Declan White
description:
𝔽𝕖𝕞!𝕓𝕣𝕦𝕒𝕣𝕪 Day 12 | OC | Pissy Ghost Roommate
Fem!Pov(obviously) | Enemies to.. ? | Stuck with Each Other
----
It's like having a cat you never asked for! Moving in to this rundown apartment wasn't your favorite idea, but hey, at least the amenities are included: wi-fi, a gym, a pool (a health code hazard at this point), and the world's pissiest ghost who keeps moving your shit for you.
